query: I feel like we're drifting — can you check our trajectory and tell me if we're still pointed at the right thing
we've been heads-down for 3 months and I want to zoom out and see if the direction is still right
run a trajectory check — I want to know if our current velocity is taking us toward or away from our actual goal
something feels off about the last two sprints. can you help me figure out if we're on track or slowly losing the thread
I want to know if the work we're doing this quarter is actually moving us toward our annual goal or just keeping us busy
check whether our current technical investments are compounding toward the product we're trying to build or pulling us in a different direction
we pivoted 4 months ago and I'm not sure the team has actually internalized the new direction — how would I tell if our trajectory has shifted?
I want an honest read on whether we're in an iteration rut — making progress but not actually changing anything that matters
help me figure out if our roadmap is actually coherent or if we're just accumulating features with no throughline
the team feels productive but I'm worried we're optimizing the wrong things. how do I check that our trajectory matches our strategy?
I made a call two months ago to prioritize enterprise over SMB — was that actually the right decision?
I want to deeply explore whether our market position is defensible — not our current direction, but the underlying competitive dynamics
can you pressure test our feature roadmap before Q4 planning? I want to know which features survive competitive pressure
evaluate whether our decision to go upmarket was sound — check the reasoning we used at the time
I want to explore the relationship between product vision and execution velocity — is there a structural model for this?
scan the codebase and tell me if we're accumulating technical debt that's going to slow us down
we have three strategic options and I need to just pick one. what's the fastest path to a defensible choice?
audit our Q3 shipping velocity and tell me if we're on pace for the annual plan
I want to design an OKR framework that keeps our team pointed in the right direction quarter over quarter
run a health check on our system architecture — are we building something that will hold together long-term?
